name: PAYOMATIC
description_short: PAYOMATIC is New York's largest check-cashing and financial services provider with nearly 140 locations offering check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards.
description_long:
PAYOMATIC operates as a check-cashing and financial services network across the New York metropolitan area, including the Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, and Long Island. The company has established itself as a convenience-focused alternative financial services provider, positioning itself as "New York's largest and most convenient provider of check cashing and financial services" with a network of approximately 140 stores.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of financial services centered around cash transactions and money movement. Core services include standard check cashing (payroll, government, tax checks), business check cashing with customized limits and same-day payouts, Western Union money transfers to 200+ countries, money orders, bill payment services for utilities and major providers (Con Edison, Verizon, Spectrum, etc.), the inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard, prepaid mobile top-ups, and direct deposit services. Their website emphasizes quick processing with no holding periods on checks and 24/7 mobile app access for account management.

PAYOMATIC differentiates itself through scale (largest Western Union agent in New York), convenience (extended hours including 10 PM Friday closings, Sunday availability), specialized business check cashing services, and the branded inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard exclusive to their stores. The company positions itself as a one-stop solution for unbanked and underbanked consumers seeking immediate cash access and money movement services.

As a check-cashing provider, PAYOMATIC serves customers without traditional bank accounts or those seeking immediate cash without bank processing delays. However, the website provides no information about fee structures, specific APRs, or regulatory disclosures, which are critical considerations for consumers evaluating alternative financial services. The company functions primarily as a transaction processor rather than a credit or lending institution.
pros: Extensive 140-store network across NYC area with convenient locations in multiple boroughs
Extended hours including 8 AM–9 PM weekdays and 10 PM Friday service, plus Sunday availability (10 AM–6 PM)
No holding period on checks—customers receive cash immediately upon cashing
Business check cashing with flexible limits, competitive rates, and same-day large payout capability
Largest Western Union agent in New York, enabling money transfers to 200+ countries
100+ bill pay options including major utilities (Con Edison, Verizon, National Grid, Spectrum, Dish Network)
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with 24/7 mobile app access and exclusive availability at PAYOMATIC stores
cons: No fee disclosure on website—check cashing, money transfer, and money order rates are not transparent
No information about APR, interest rates, or terms for any products or services offered
Limited to New York metropolitan area only; no national presence or online remote services
Website lacks regulatory compliance information, licensing details, or independent verification of claims
No mention of consumer protections, dispute resolution processes, or customer complaint procedures
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers in NYC needing immediate check-cashing access without bank delays
Small business owners requiring same-day cash for business checks and recurring check cashing needs
Immigrants and international money senders using Western Union for transfers to family abroad
Consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking bill payment, money orders, and prepaid card options
diagnosis: PAYOMATIC is best for New York-area residents and small business owners who need immediate cash access, lack traditional bank accounts, or require frequent check-cashing and money transfer services. The main caveat is the complete absence of fee transparency on their website—consumers cannot determine actual costs before visiting a store, making price comparison impossible.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, tax checks with no holding period)
Business check cashing with customized limits and same-day payouts
Western Union money transfers (send and receive) to 200+ countries
Bill payment (100+ providers including Con Edison, NYCHA rent, Verizon, Spectrum, National Grid, Optimum, Dish Network)
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with mobile app
